description: A fixed-fee project has been completed, and the finance team needs to create the final invoice.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the client has signed off on the project completion document.

expected_outcome.expected: The account manager confirms the project is officially closed.

nodes.task_description: Create a one-time invoice in the PSA for the total fixed-fee amount of the project.

expected_outcome.expected: An invoice for the project work is generated.

nodes.task_description: Send the invoice to the client.

expected_outcome.expected: The client receives the final bill for the project.
